//: Copy the relevant sections into your Antigravity mcp_config.json

env.WORDPRESS_APPLICATION_PASSWORD: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx

env.WP_APP_PASSWORD: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx

//notes.credentials: Use the SAME username and Application Password across all 3 required servers AND your Node.js scripts. Mismatched credentials cause HTTP 401 errors.
//notes.app_password_format: WordPress Application Passwords use spaces: 'xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx'. Create one at: WP Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords.
//notes.api_key: Get your Google API key from: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials. Enable the Stitch API.
//notes.global_install: For best performance, install MCP servers globally: npm install -g wp-elementor-mcp elementor-mcp. Using npx causes startup timeouts.
//notes.never_edit_from_agent: NEVER let the AI agent edit mcp_config.json — it will freeze the IDE. Always edit manually.
